questionHtml:
A student was investigating rates of reaction. In which of the following cases would a colorimeter show a change in absorbance?

A.  KBr (aq) + Cl2 (aq)

B.  Cu (s) + Na2SO4 (aq)

C.  HCl (aq) + NaOH (aq)

D.  (CH3)3COH (aq) + K2Cr2O7 (aq)

meta.title: A student was investigating rates of reaction. In which of the following cases would a colorimeter show a change in absorbance? A. KBr (aq) + Cl2 (aq) B. Cu (s) + Na2SO4 (aq) C. HC
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
